sentences.text: A repeatable loop — and what's next
You've done the whole cycle once: tried a big change, rewound when it broke something, tried again carefully, and fixed a real bug by describing what you saw.
That's a workflow you can reuse for every app from here.
Right now your tracker's word list lives inside its own folder.
But your real vocabulary might live somewhere else — a Google Doc, a Notion page, a note on your phone.
Next lesson, Connect Claude to Your Tools, you'll bring that outside content in, and even let Claude publish updates for you.
